lede: A look at October 1 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Dave Arneson and Severus Alexander, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: International Court of Justice
events.desc: The International Court of Justice rules that Chile is not obliged to negotiate access to the Pacific Ocean with Bolivia.

events.title: 2012 Lamma Island ferry collision
events.desc: A ferry collision off the coast of Hong Kong kills 38 people and injures 102 others.

events.title: Tuvalu
events.desc: Tuvalu gains independence from the United Kingdom.

events.title: Free Speech Movement
events.desc: The Free Speech Movement is launched on the campus of the University of California, Berkeley.

events.title: China
events.desc: The People's Republic of China is established.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: After a one-month siege, German troops occupy Warsaw.

events.title: World War I
events.desc: World War I: The Egyptian Expeditionary Force captures Damascus.

events.title: Stanford University
events.desc: Stanford University opens its doors in California, United States.

events.title: Third Treaty of San Ildefonso
events.desc: Via the Third Treaty of San Ildefonso, Spain cedes Louisiana to France, which would sell the land to the United States thirty months later.

events.title: Edgar, King of England
events.desc: Edgar the Peaceful becomes king of all England, in succession to Eadwig.

births.name: Dave Arneson
births.line: American game designer, co-created Dungeons & Dragons

births.name: Klaus Wowereit
births.line: German civil servant and politician, Governing Mayor of Berlin

births.name: Zhu Rongji
births.line: Chinese engineer and politician, 5th Premier of the People's Republic of China

births.name: Jimmy Carter
births.line: American naval lieutenant, politician, 39th President of the United States, and Nobel Prize laureate

deaths.text: Charles Aznavour, French-Armenian singer, composer, writer, filmmaker and public figure
Enrico De Nicola, Italian journalist, lawyer, politician, and first President of Italy

observances.text: Beginning of the United States' Fiscal Year
